title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
hints: Consider the total number of elements. Do you need to find the k-th smallest element in the combined sorted sequence?
Since both arrays are sorted, you can find the k-th element by comparing elements at index k/2 in each array and discarding the smaller half.
Implement a recursive or iterative function that finds the k-th smallest element by eliminating half of the remaining candidates in each step.
